title: CBCModernWarfare
description: an expansion for Create BIg Cannons aiming to add new content and modern weaponry
body:
CBC Modern warfare
is an expansion for Create BIg Cannons aiming to add new content and modern weaponry.

 

[Join The Discord Here](https://discord.gg/HmZ8eAayKm)

 

What the Mod adds?
CBC Modern Warfare (CBC: MW) currently has:

- Multiblock munitions launchers, an entirely new cannon type that fires multiblock munitions for stuff like rockets and torpedos and can use big cannon shells as warheads
- Multiblock medium cannons, a new cannon class that fills the gap between cbcs big and autocannons with its own uses and features
- Multiblock rotarycannons, fires at a even higher rate of fire
- A new assortment of shells and mechanics
- Explosive Reactive Armor to counter shaped charge shells
- More content will be added over time
 

What dependencies are required?
Bolth [Create](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create) and [Create Big Cannons](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-big-cannons) is required.
